evaluationManifest.title: Agent Tool Use Baseline
evaluationManifest.scope: Baseline evaluation of agent tool selection and task completion.

tasks.prompt: Retrieve the current status of service X and summarize it.
tasks.successCondition: Response references the retrieved status and contains no fabricated values.

criteria.name: correctness
criteria.description: Output matches retrieved evidence without fabrication.

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.description: Output addresses all parts of the prompt.
